name: Better Notifications
description: Custom sounds, filtering, and priority settings. Fewer interruptions.

name: Quick Reactions
description: Customizable reaction menu. React to messages without navigating three submenus.

name: Message Formatting
description: Markdown support and custom text styles. Teams' default editor is bad. This fixes it.

name: Meeting Enhancer
description: Auto-recording, better blur, custom layouts. Makes calls less painful.

name: Performance Monitor
description: See what Teams is doing to your CPU in real time. Useful. Slightly horrifying.

name: Keyboard Shortcuts
description: Dozens of extra shortcuts. If you like your mouse, this plugin will change that.

name: File Manager
description: Search and organize shared files without clicking through six tabs.

name: Privacy Guard
description: Blocks telemetry and tightens data controls. Microsoft won't be thrilled.

name: Status Customizer
description: Custom status messages and calendar-based auto-switching. Look busy when you're not.
